metadata.rationale: 样本用被编辑过的“转播画面/现场大屏/数据卡”来强化“蒯曼4比1王艺迪”的既定结果，同时正文又出现局数与赛制表述自相矛盾（如暗示“第六局”“七局激战”），并把一场假定比分的队内胜负夸大推导为“席位基本锁定”，因此整体给受众的主要结论具有明显误导性。

prediction.predicted_label: verdict=Mostly False | taxonomy=T1 Fabrication; V2 Visual Editing; C2 Contextual Inconsistency

The image contains a broadcast overlay that explicitly states "WTT新加坡大满贯2026", "女单1/8决赛" (Women's Singles Round of 16), and "蒯曼 4:1 王艺迪". The visual text confirms the event name, round, players, and score described in the news. Therefore, the image supports the news content.
I will use VQA to confirm the text visible in the image overlay to ensure it matches the news text details about the event, match stage, and score.

prediction.taxonomy_rationale: The text fabricates a detailed report of a future 2026 match (T1), while the visuals are contextually mismatched, showing a male player for a women's match and a different tournament (Chongqing vs Singapore) in the background (C2), with scoreboards and text overlays clearly added (V2).
